title: Mossel Bay flat murder: Bail application today
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 39-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 22 September, for a formal bail application.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 39-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 22 September, for a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The accused, Sonwabile Mbambo, was arrested in KwaNonqaba less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was found with a wound to the neck on Monday 1 September.","html":"The accused, Sonwabile Mbambo, was arrested in KwaNonqaba less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was found with a wound to the neck on Monday 1 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mbambo is facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police had to force open the door and discovered Annandale’s body. The medical personnel declared her dead on the scene.","html":"The police had to force open the door and discovered Annandale’s body. The medical personnel declared her dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Crime scene experts combed the flat for clues, while follow-up investigations led the police to Moonie Street in KwaNonqaba, where the victim’s vehicle was found abandoned.","html":"Crime scene experts combed the flat for clues, while follow-up investigations led the police to Moonie Street in KwaNonqaba, where the victim’s vehicle was found abandoned."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser will attend the court proceedings.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser will attend the court proceedings."},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld","Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay flat murder: Bail application today
